zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Boves-Coucy於1103年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆波福斯時，她的父親Thomas de Marle-Coucy30歲，母親Mélisende de Crécy20歲。她於1123年與Guillaume de Craon De Nevers結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1167年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Boves-Coucy was born in 1103, in Boves, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, was 30 and her mother, Mélisende de Crécy, was 20. She married Guillaume de Craon De Nevers in 1123. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1167, in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Boves-Coucy est née en 1103, à Boves, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Thomas de Marle-Coucy, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mélisende de Crécy, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Craon De Nevers en 1123. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1167, à Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Boves-Coucy 1103 in Boves, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Marle-Coucy 30 und ihre Mutter Mélisende de Crécy 20. Sie hat 1123 Guillaume de Craon De Nevers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1167 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich.

Lei sposato Guillaume de Craon De Nevers nel 1123. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1167, nel Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 64 anni.

ko.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라
ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Boves-Coucy(이)가 1103년 프랑스 피카디 솜 보브스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Marle-Coucy(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mélisende de Crécy(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1123년 Guillaume de Craon De Nevers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1167년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Boves-Coucy родилась в 1103 г. в местности бовесь, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Thomas de Marle-Coucy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mélisende de Crécy, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Craon De Nevers в 1123 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1167 г. в местности краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 64 лет.
